entity_types.name: Person
entity_types.description: An actor, director, producer, writer or reviewer in the movie graph.

relation_types.name: ACTED_IN
relation_types.description: Connects a Person to a Movie they acted in. Carries a `roles` list property.

relation_types.name: DIRECTED
relation_types.description: Connects a Person to a Movie they directed.

relation_types.name: PRODUCED
relation_types.description: Connects a Person to a Movie they produced.

relation_types.name: WROTE
relation_types.description: Connects a Person to a Movie they wrote.

relation_types.name: REVIEWED
relation_types.description: Connects a Person to a Movie they reviewed. Carries `summary` and `rating` properties.

relation_types.name: FOLLOWS
relation_types.description: Connects a Person to another Person they follow.
